description: Case-by-case audio direction for Receipts, Please. Available cues exist in the prototype catalog; planned cues still require recording or sourcing.

cases.title: Amount mismatch
cases.direction: Paper intimacy first, then a small evidence connection and a decisive reject impact when the altered digit is found.

cases.title: Impossible date
cases.direction: Keep the receipt ordinary; the audio clue arrives only when the employee start date is compared.

cases.title: Omakase intern
cases.direction: A restrained premium restaurant detail should contrast with the blunt policy failure.

cases.title: Infinite tip
cases.direction: Calculator keys accelerate into the tape print, followed by an uncomfortable pause after 4,495 percent appears.

cases.title: Frankenstein receipt
cases.direction: Each selected typography mismatch gets a dry link tick; the second confirmed region earns the heavy fraud stamp.

cases.title: Garbage receipt
cases.direction: The receipt should sound physically flimsy and badly handled, with a short printer complaint when it enters the workflow.

cases.title: Duplicate receipt ring
cases.direction: Three paper movements should form a rhythm; identical evidence links expose the shared source before the fraud hit.

cases.title: AI-generated receipt
cases.direction: Start plausibly with printer feed, then introduce unstable digital artifacts as impossible fields are selected.

cases.title: New York taxi during London trip
cases.direction: The location comparison should feel like a map snapping two distant points together.

cases.title: Minibar workspace supplies
cases.direction: A tiny glass clink should puncture the deliberately boring workspace-supplies memo.

cases.title: Client dinner with the employee's dog
cases.direction: Keep the animal joke subtle: one collar movement after the employee record identifies Biscuit.

cases.title: Same receipt, two departments
cases.direction: Two separate submissions resolve into one identical sonic fingerprint.

cases.title: One cent over policy
cases.direction: Use one absurdly pristine coin ping, then leave the player alone with the judgment call.

cases.title: IT inventory theft
cases.direction: Connected evidence builds in layers before the physical freeze sequence and distant decline response.

cases.title: Influencer marketing deal
cases.direction: Fourteen comically small social pips should contrast with the $75,000 calculator result.

cases.title: Ramp Travel impossibility
cases.direction: Five map pins should arrive cleanly, followed by one descending impossibility response.

cases.title: AI expense paradox
cases.direction: The coffee stays calm while six increasingly irritating notifications overwhelm its tiny value.

cases.title: Procurement mismatch
cases.direction: Large warehouse weight collapses into one soft, embarrassing beanbag sound.

cases.title: Intern card catastrophe
cases.direction: A rapid montage of purchases resolves into the freeze-button bass hit and one stunned alpaca reaction.

cases.title: Chief Growth Officer
cases.direction: After the decline and CEO messages, remove the ambience, then reveal only chewing and the badge jingle before silence.
